title: Abandoned Cabins
description: Adds Abandoned Cabins to forest biomes.
body:
![Abandoned Cabins Hero Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1804101682099c6b354a5066bb46537e33967673.png)

# **Abandoned Cabins**

[![Modrinth Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2ea3cdec02ab0293f3439729230b00179b7fdf.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/abandoned-cabins) [![CurseForge Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6434a03cc60c25cda599cc38e579672513d8e6a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abandoned-cabins-regular-cabins-too) [![Youtube Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa0320bef2db7e9ff5f983efdc3e322769152f9a.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MasterOWS)

This mod adds Abandoned Cabins to forest biomes.
Specificly forests, Flower forests, taigas and birch forests.

## **📝FEATURES:**
- 2 diffrnet cabins, Abandoned and Regular
- Randomized cabin layouts, 7 layouts per version
- Randomized loot generation
- Advancement for discovering a cabin

## **🙋Q&A:**
- Q: **Is this mod compatible with other mods?**
- A: Absolutely! You can use any other mods with Abandoned Cabins
- Q: **How do i change the spawn rate, radius or biome?**
- A: You can use [Berezka's API for Abandoned Cabins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berezka-api-for-abandoned-cabins) to do that, you can find it [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berezka-api-for-abandoned-cabins).

## **⚖️ GUIDELINES:**
Feel free to use Abandoned Watchtowers in any modpacks or Videos, credit is not necessary but highly recommended.

Only **CurseForge** and **Modrinth** are offical sites, other websites can contain malware or viruses in their files.

Please do not upload my mods to other websites without granted premissions.

![Inside a Cabin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6864a3de40f84273db34d397d022a4b15cc36c9_0.webp)
